creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
We have now updated production to 5.0.4.1.  By doing so, I believe we have picked
up upstream's change to fix MySQL 8.0 (originally committed to the 5.2 tree and
then cherry-picked.)

I think the next goal now should be 5.2 instead of 5.0.6.  The latter does not
gain us much, and is in deed now abandoned by upstream.
